Class ReportingController

java.lang.Object
ReportingController
public class ReportingController extends Object
Controller class for the Reporting View. Handles generation of sales reports (X and Z reports), product usage charts, and menu item management.

  • Constructor Details

    • ReportingController

      public ReportingController()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the controller class. Sets up table columns, event handlers, and checks the status of the last Z-Report.

    • getConnection

      private Connection getConnection() throws SQLException
      Establishes a connection to the database using credentials from dbSetup.
      Returns:
      Connection object
      Throws:
      SQLException - if connection fails

    • setupUsageTable

      private void setupUsageTable()
      Configures the columns for the Product Usage table.

    • setupSalesTable

      private void setupSalesTable()
      Configures the columns for the Sales Report table.

    • setupEventHandlers

      private void setupEventHandlers()
      Binds button actions to their respective methods.

    • checkLastZReport

      private void checkLastZReport()
      Checks the database for the most recent Z-Report date. Disables the Z-Report button if one has already been run today.

    • loadTodaysZReport

      private void loadTodaysZReport()
      Loads the content of the Z-Report generated today, if it exists.

    • generateProductUsageChart

      private void generateProductUsageChart()
      Generates a report of inventory usage between two dates. Queries the database for ingredient usage based on orders.

    • generateXReport

      private void generateXReport()
      Generates an X-Report (hourly sales breakdown) for the current day. Does not reset totals.

    • generateZReport

      private void generateZReport()
      Generates a Z-Report (end of day summary) and saves it to the database. This action effectively "closes" the day.

    • generateSalesReport

      private void generateSalesReport()
      Generates a sales report for menu items within a date range.

    • addNewMenuItem

      private void addNewMenuItem()
      Adds a new item to the menu database.

    • showAlert

      private void showAlert(String msg)
      Displays an alert dialog with a specific message.
      Parameters:
      msg - The message to display
